password.title: Change password
password.description: Set a new administrator password before configuring the system.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.description: Before you begin, you can configure external S3 storage for backup and replication.

s3.title: S3 configuration
s3.description: Enter connection parameters for an S3-compatible storage (external S3 S3, etc.).

finish.title: Setup complete
finish.description: The system is ready. You can go to the management console.

passwordDialog.title: Change administrator password
passwordDialog.description: This is a required step on first login. Replace the default password to continue setup.
